title: Security Group: Administrator
description:
Security Group: Administrator

Security Group: Administrator

This page allows you to configure user groups.

Every Epson RC+ 8.0 user must belong to a group. Two groups cannot be deleted or modified: Administrators and Guests. Administrators have full rights. Guests have no rights.

To add a group

Click
	 the [Add] button.

Type
	 in a name for the group.

Click
	 the [Apply] button.

To delete a group

Select
	 the group you want to delete.

Click
	 the [Delete] button.

A
	 confirmation message to delete the group will appear.

To change rights for groups

Select
	 the group you want to change rights for.

	Note that you cannot change rights for Administrators and Guests.

Add
	 a right.

	Set the checkbox(es) for the desired rights in the [Rights] checkbox
	 list.

Remove
	 a right.

	Clear the checkbox(es) for the rights you want to remove in the [Right]
	 checkbox list.
